testcase.name: test_get_without_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Should return 401 without auth, got 403 assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_service_due_delete.py:162: in test_get_without_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"Should return 401 without auth, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Should return 401 without auth, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Should return 401 without auth, got 403 assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Should return 401 without auth, got 403 assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
